1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# BUJB Jurisdiction Module - Implementation seat for fenestrate + garrison
20	#
21	# BCG-compliant module housing both BUS0 jurisdiction verbs (fenestrate,
22	# garrison) and the contracts not expressed in regime data:
23	# the three shell-letter -> command= directive mappings (b/c/w),
24	# the workload privkey destination paths on the remote per shell-letter,
25	# the canonical WSL distribution name, and the Windows OpenSSH sshd_config
26	# hardening directive set.
27	#
28	# Sub-letter b in bujb signals the bash-format implementation. A future
29	# PowerShell sibling would mint as bujp_jurisdiction.ps1.
30	
31	set -euo pipefail
32	
33	# Multiple inclusion detection
34	test -z "${ZBUJB_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module bujb multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
35	ZBUJB_SOURCED=1
36	
37	# Tinder constants (pure string literals — available at source time)
38	
39	# Shell-letter -> command= directive mappings.
40	# Forced commands routed through SSH_ORIGINAL_COMMAND keep workload account
41	# behaviour pinned to the chosen shell regardless of what the SSH client
42	# requests. Locked spec content; mirrored in BUSJG{B,C,W}.
43	BUJB_command_b='command="/bin/bash -lc \"$SSH_ORIGINAL_COMMAND\"",no-port-forwarding,no-X11-forwarding,no-agent-forwarding'
44	BUJB_command_c='command="C:/cygwin64/bin/bash --login -c \"$SSH_ORIGINAL_COMMAND\"",no-port-forwarding,no-X11-forwarding,no-agent-forwarding'
45	BUJB_command_w='command="C:/Windows/System32/wsl.exe --distribution rbtww-main --exec /bin/bash -lc \"$SSH_ORIGINAL_COMMAND\"",no-port-forwarding,no-X11-forwarding,no-agent-forwarding'
46	
47	# Shell-letter -> workload privkey destination path on the remote
48	# (relative to the workload account home directory).
49	BUJB_workload_keypath_b='.ssh/id_ed25519'
50	BUJB_workload_keypath_c='.ssh/id_ed25519'
51	BUJB_workload_keypath_w='.ssh/id_ed25519'
52	
53	# Canonical WSL distribution name reached by garrison-w.
54	BUJB_wsl_distribution='rbtww-main'
55	
56	# Windows OpenSSH sshd_config hardening directive set written by
57	# fenestrate phase 1. Newline-joined; each directive is asserted by
58	# bash-side parse after PowerShell Get-Content returns the raw bytes.
59	BUJB_sshd_hardening='PubkeyAuthentication yes
60	PasswordAuthentication no
61	PermitEmptyPasswords no'
62	
63	######################################################################
64	# Internal Functions (zbujb_*)
65	
66	zbujb_kindle() {
67	  test -z "${ZBUJB_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module bujb already kindled"
68	
69	  # Fenestrate temp file paths — ssh stdout/stderr captured here so
70	  # callers parse from disk (no `$(ssh ...)` capture).
71	  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDOUT="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_phase1_stdout.txt"
72	  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDERR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_phase1_stderr.txt"
73	  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_RESTART_STDOUT="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_restart_stdout.txt"
74	  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_RESTART_STDERR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_restart_stderr.txt"
75	  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDOUT="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_phase2_stdout.txt"
76	  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDERR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_phase2_stderr.txt"
77	
78	  # stat captures (per-key-slot for parallel forensics on resolve).
79	  readonly ZBUJB_STAT_STDOUT_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_stat_priv_stdout.txt"
80	  readonly ZBUJB_STAT_STDERR_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_stat_priv_stderr.txt"
81	  readonly ZBUJB_STAT_STDOUT_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_stat_work_stdout.txt"
82	  readonly ZBUJB_STAT_STDERR_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_stat_work_stderr.txt"
83	
84	  # ssh-keygen dry-load captures (resolve-time, per slot).
85	  readonly ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDOUT_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_dryload_priv_stdout.txt"
86	  readonly ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDERR_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_dryload_priv_stderr.txt"
87	  readonly ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDOUT_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_dryload_work_stdout.txt"
88	  readonly ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDERR_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_dryload_work_stderr.txt"
89	
90	  # ssh-keygen pubkey-emit captures (garrison step4 = workload pubkey,
91	  # fenestrate phase1 = admin pubkey).
92	  readonly ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_pubkey_work_stdout.txt"
93	  readonly ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_pubkey_work_stderr.txt"
94	  readonly ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_pubkey_priv_stdout.txt"
95	  readonly ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_pubkey_priv_stderr.txt"
96	
97	  # base64 capture (garrison step5 = workload privkey b64-encoded for
98	  # heredoc transport to remote).
99	  readonly ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDOUT="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_key_b64_stdout.txt"
100	  readonly ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDERR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_key_b64_stderr.txt"
101	
102	  readonly ZBUJB_KINDLED=1
103	}
104	
105	zbujb_sentinel() {
106	  test "${ZBUJB_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module bujb not kindled - call zbujb_kindle first"
107	}
108	
109	# zbujb_check_key_file PATH VARNAME SLOT -- validate SSH private key at PATH:
110	# exists, mode 0600, parseable + unencrypted (ssh-keygen -y dry-load with
111	# empty passphrase). Diagnostic uses VARNAME as the field label. SLOT
112	# (priv|work) selects the kindle temp-file pair used for stat + dry-load
113	# stdout/stderr capture so failures preserve forensic evidence per BCG.
114	zbujb_check_key_file() {
115	  local z_path="${1:-}"
116	  local z_varname="${2:-}"
117	  local z_slot="${3:-}"
118	
119	  test -n "${z_path}"    || buc_die "${z_varname}: empty path"
120	  test -f "${z_path}"    || buc_die "${z_varname}: file not found: ${z_path}"
121	
122	  local z_stat_stdout="" z_stat_stderr="" z_dry_stdout="" z_dry_stderr=""
123	  case "${z_slot}" in
124	    priv)
125	      z_stat_stdout="${ZBUJB_STAT_STDOUT_PRIV}"
126	      z_stat_stderr="${ZBUJB_STAT_STDERR_PRIV}"
127	      z_dry_stdout="${ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDOUT_PRIV}"
128	      z_dry_stderr="${ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDERR_PRIV}"
129	      ;;
130	    work)
131	      z_stat_stdout="${ZBUJB_STAT_STDOUT_WORK}"
132	      z_stat_stderr="${ZBUJB_STAT_STDERR_WORK}"
133	      z_dry_stdout="${ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDOUT_WORK}"
134	      z_dry_stderr="${ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDERR_WORK}"
135	      ;;
136	    *)
137	      buc_die "zbujb_check_key_file: invalid slot (expected priv|work): '${z_slot}'"
138	      ;;
139	  esac
140	
141	  # BSD stat first (Mac), GNU stat fallback (Linux). The failed flavor's
142	  # stderr is overwritten by the successful flavor's invocation; on total
143	  # failure z_stat_stderr holds the GNU-attempt error.
144	  if stat -f '%A' "${z_path}" > "${z_stat_stdout}" 2> "${z_stat_stderr}"; then
145	    : # macOS / BSD stat succeeded
146	  elif stat -c '%a' "${z_path}" > "${z_stat_stdout}" 2> "${z_stat_stderr}"; then
147	    : # GNU/Linux stat succeeded
148	  else
149	    buc_die "${z_varname}: cannot stat ${z_path} — see ${z_stat_stderr}"
150	  fi
151	
152	  local z_mode
153	  z_mode=$(<"${z_stat_stdout}")
154	  z_mode="${z_mode//$'\n'/}"
155	  test "${z_mode}" = "600" \
156	    || buc_die "${z_varname}: mode must be 0600, got ${z_mode}: ${z_path}"
157	
158	  ssh-keygen -y -P '' -f "${z_path}" \
159	      > "${z_dry_stdout}" \
160	      2> "${z_dry_stderr}" \
161	    || buc_die "${z_varname}: ssh-keygen -y dry-load failed (passphrase-protected or malformed): ${z_path} — see ${z_dry_stderr}"
162	}
163	
164	######################################################################
165	# Public Functions (bujb_*)
166	
167	# bujb_resolve_investiture -- sole runtime cross-validation entrypoint.
168	#
169	# Preconditions: BURC, BURN, BURP regimes already kindled and enforced
170	# (the bujb_cli furnish handles this for tabtarget callers; the cli's
171	# BURP and BURN sourcing also implicitly cross-validates that
172	# BURP_VICEROYALTY refers to a registered BURN profile by file presence).
173	#
174	# Behaviour: validates BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE and BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE
175	# (exist, mode 0600, ssh-keygen -y dry-load proves parseable + unencrypted) —
176	# the validation regime enforce cannot do because it requires running
177	# ssh-keygen against the private key. After validation, sets ZBUJB_RESOLVED=1
178	# as the I-have-been-validated sentinel. Callers reference the regime vars
179	# directly (BURP_*, BURN_*, BURC_*); no separate published namespace.
180	# Single-call-per-process; subsequent calls die.
181	bujb_resolve_investiture() {
182	  zbujb_sentinel
183	  zburc_sentinel
184	  zburn_sentinel
185	  zburp_sentinel
186	
187	  test -z "${ZBUJB_RESOLVED:-}" \
188	    || buc_die "bujb_resolve_investiture already called - single-call-per-process"
189	
190	  zbujb_check_key_file "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}" "BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE" priv
191	  zbujb_check_key_file "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}"   "BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE"   work
192	
193	  readonly ZBUJB_RESOLVED=1
194	}
195	
196	# bujb_command_for_capture SHELL_LETTER -- emit the workload authorized_keys
197	# command= directive for shell-letter b, c, or w. _capture form so callers
198	# may use `$()` per BCG line 502; returns 1 on invalid letter, callers must
199	# `|| buc_die`.
200	bujb_command_for_capture() {
201	  zbujb_sentinel
202	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
203	  case "${z_letter}" in
204	    b) echo "${BUJB_command_b}" ;;
205	    c) echo "${BUJB_command_c}" ;;
206	    w) echo "${BUJB_command_w}" ;;
207	    *) return 1 ;;
208	  esac
209	}
210	
211	# bujb_workload_keypath_for_capture SHELL_LETTER -- emit the workload privkey
212	# remote destination path (relative to workload home) for b, c, or w.
213	# Returns 1 on invalid letter; callers must `|| buc_die`.
214	bujb_workload_keypath_for_capture() {
215	  zbujb_sentinel
216	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
217	  case "${z_letter}" in
218	    b) echo "${BUJB_workload_keypath_b}" ;;
219	    c) echo "${BUJB_workload_keypath_c}" ;;
220	    w) echo "${BUJB_workload_keypath_w}" ;;
221	    *) return 1 ;;
222	  esac
223	}
224	
225	######################################################################
226	# Internal: Garrison helpers
227	
228	zbujb_assert_shell_letter() {
229	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
230	  case "${z_letter}" in
231	    b|c|w) ;;
232	    *) buc_die "Invalid shell-letter (expected b/c/w): '${z_letter}'" ;;
233	  esac
234	}
235	
236	# zbujb_garrison_assert_platform LETTER -- assert BURN_PLATFORM
237	# matches the shell-letter's required platform set.
238	zbujb_garrison_assert_platform() {
239	  zbujb_sentinel
240	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
241	  zbujb_assert_shell_letter "${z_letter}"
242	  case "${z_letter}" in
243	    b)
244	      case "${BURN_PLATFORM}" in
245	        bubep_linux|bubep_mac) ;;
246	        *) buc_die "garrison-b requires bubep_linux or bubep_mac, got '${BURN_PLATFORM}'" ;;
247	      esac
248	      ;;
249	    c|w)
250	      test "${BURN_PLATFORM}" = "bubep_windows" \
251	        || buc_die "garrison-${z_letter} requires bubep_windows, got '${BURN_PLATFORM}'"
252	      ;;
253	  esac
254	}
255	
256	# zbujb_workload_home_capture LETTER -- emit the absolute workload home path
257	# on the remote node for the given shell-letter. _capture form per BCG line
258	# 502; returns 1 on unsupported platform or invalid letter, callers must
259	# `|| buc_die`.
260	zbujb_workload_home_capture() {
261	  zbujb_sentinel
262	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
263	  local z_wlu="${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
264	  case "${z_letter}" in
265	    b)
266	      case "${BURN_PLATFORM}" in
267	        bubep_linux) echo "/home/${z_wlu}" ;;
268	        bubep_mac)   echo "/Users/${z_wlu}" ;;
269	        *)           return 1 ;;
270	      esac
271	      ;;
272	    c|w) echo "/home/${z_wlu}" ;;
273	    *)   return 1 ;;
274	  esac
275	}
276	
277	# zbujb_admin_exec LETTER -- read a bash script from stdin and execute it on
278	# the remote node as the privileged user, wrapped in the shell-letter-
279	# appropriate invocation (native bash for b; Cygwin's bash --login for c;
280	# wsl.exe to BUJB_wsl_distribution as root for w).
281	zbujb_admin_exec() {
282	  zbujb_sentinel
283	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
284	  zbujb_assert_shell_letter "${z_letter}"
285	
286	  local z_remote_invoker
287	  case "${z_letter}" in
288	    b) z_remote_invoker='bash -s' ;;
289	    c) z_remote_invoker='C:/cygwin64/bin/bash --login -s' ;;
290	    w) z_remote_invoker="wsl.exe --distribution ${BUJB_wsl_distribution} --user root bash -s" ;;
291	  esac
292	
293	  ssh -i "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}"     \
294	      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                         \
295	      -o BatchMode=yes                              \
296	      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new           \
297	      -o ConnectTimeout=15                          \
298	      "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
299	      "${z_remote_invoker}"
300	}
301	
302	######################################################################
303	# Internal: Garrison steps (6-step ceremony per BUSJG{B,C,W})
304	
305	# Step 1 -- open admin SSH (test reachability under key-only auth).
306	zbujb_garrison_step1_admin_open() {
307	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
308	  buc_step "  [1/6] Open admin SSH (${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}@${BURN_HOST})"
309	
310	  local z_exit=0
311	  zbujb_admin_exec "${z_letter}" <<<'exit 0' || z_exit=$?
312	  if test "${z_exit}" -ne 0; then
313	    case "${BURN_PLATFORM}" in
314	      bubep_windows)
315	        buc_die "Admin SSH failed (exit ${z_exit}). Run fenestrate first: tt/buw-jpF.Fenestrate.sh ${BURP_VICEROYALTY}"
316	        ;;
317	      *)
318	        buc_die "Admin SSH failed (exit ${z_exit}). Place admin pubkey via 'ssh-copy-id -i ${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}.pub ${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}@${BURN_HOST}' first."
319	        ;;
320	    esac
321	  fi
322	}
323	
324	# Step 2 -- destroy any existing workload account + home.
325	zbujb_garrison_step2_destroy() {
326	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
327	  local z_wlu="${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
328	  local z_wlhome
329	  z_wlhome=$(zbujb_workload_home_capture "${z_letter}") \
330	    || buc_die "step2: workload home unresolvable for letter='${z_letter}' platform='${BURN_PLATFORM}'"
331	  buc_step "  [2/6] Destroy workload (${z_wlu})"
332	
333	  case "${z_letter}" in
334	    b)
335	      zbujb_admin_exec b <<SCRIPT
336	set -uo pipefail
337	sudo -n userdel -r '${z_wlu}' 2>/dev/null || true
338	sudo -n rm -rf '${z_wlhome}' 2>/dev/null || true
339	SCRIPT
340	      ;;
341	    c)
342	      # Cygwin workload is a Windows local user; delete via net.exe then
343	      # purge the Cygwin home directory.
344	      zbujb_admin_exec c <<SCRIPT
345	set -uo pipefail
346	net.exe user '${z_wlu}' /delete > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
347	rm -rf '${z_wlhome}'                              2>/dev/null || true
348	rm -rf '/cygdrive/c/cygwin64/home/${z_wlu}'       2>/dev/null || true
349	SCRIPT
350	      ;;
351	    w)
352	      zbujb_admin_exec w <<SCRIPT
353	set -uo pipefail
354	userdel -r '${z_wlu}' 2>/dev/null || true
355	rm -rf '${z_wlhome}'  2>/dev/null || true
356	SCRIPT
357	      ;;
358	  esac
359	}
360	
361	# Step 3 -- create the workload account fresh, ssh-only, no privilege.
362	zbujb_garrison_step3_create() {
363	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
364	  local z_wlu="${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
365	  buc_step "  [3/6] Create workload (${z_wlu})"
366	
367	  case "${z_letter}" in
368	    b)
369	      case "${BURN_PLATFORM}" in
370	        bubep_linux)
371	          zbujb_admin_exec b <<SCRIPT
372	set -euo pipefail
373	sudo -n useradd --create-home --shell /bin/bash '${z_wlu}'
374	sudo -n passwd  --lock '${z_wlu}'
375	SCRIPT
376	          ;;
377	        bubep_mac)
378	          # Mac uses dscl/sysadminctl; left for in-environment refinement.
379	          # Operator may need to seat a more idiomatic primary group ID.
380	          zbujb_admin_exec b <<SCRIPT
381	set -euo pipefail
382	sudo -n sysadminctl -addUser '${z_wlu}' -roleAccount
383	sudo -n dscl . -create '/Users/${z_wlu}' UserShell /bin/bash
384	SCRIPT
385	          ;;
386	      esac
387	      ;;
388	    c)
389	      # Cygwin reflects Windows user accounts; mint via net.exe with a
390	      # disabled-password posture (we want ssh-key-only).
391	      zbujb_admin_exec c <<SCRIPT
392	set -euo pipefail
393	net.exe user '${z_wlu}' /add /passwordreq:no /active:yes > /dev/null
394	mkpasswd -l -u '${z_wlu}' >> /etc/passwd
395	mkdir -p '/home/${z_wlu}'
396	chown -R '${z_wlu}' '/home/${z_wlu}'
397	SCRIPT
398	      ;;
399	    w)
400	      zbujb_admin_exec w <<SCRIPT
401	set -euo pipefail
402	useradd --create-home --shell /bin/bash '${z_wlu}'
403	passwd  --lock '${z_wlu}'
404	SCRIPT
405	      ;;
406	  esac
407	}
408	
409	# Step 4 -- write workload authorized_keys with the shell-letter command=
410	# directive and the workload pubkey (derived locally from the privkey).
411	zbujb_garrison_step4_place_trust() {
412	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
413	  local z_wlu="${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
414	  local z_wlhome
415	  z_wlhome=$(zbujb_workload_home_capture "${z_letter}") \
416	    || buc_die "step4: workload home unresolvable for letter='${z_letter}' platform='${BURN_PLATFORM}'"
417	  buc_step "  [4/6] Place workload trust (${z_wlhome}/.ssh/authorized_keys)"
418	
419	  local z_command_directive
420	  z_command_directive=$(bujb_command_for_capture "${z_letter}") \
421	    || buc_die "step4: bujb_command_for_capture failed for letter='${z_letter}'"
422	
423	  ssh-keygen -y -P '' -f "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}" \
424	      > "${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_WORK}" \
425	      2> "${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_WORK}" \
426	    || buc_die "ssh-keygen -y failed for workload key: ${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE} — see ${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_WORK}"
427	  local z_pubkey
428	  z_pubkey=$(<"${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_WORK}")
429	  z_pubkey="${z_pubkey//$'\n'/}"
430	
431	  local z_authkeys_line="${z_command_directive} ${z_pubkey}"
432	
433	  # Precompute sudo prefix locally (bash parameter expansion, no $()) so the
434	  # heredoc lines don't carry inline `$([ ... ] && echo "sudo -n ")` calls.
435	  local z_sudo_prefix=""
436	  test "${z_letter}" = "b" && z_sudo_prefix="sudo -n "
437	
438	  case "${z_letter}" in
439	    b|w)
440	      zbujb_admin_exec "${z_letter}" <<SCRIPT
441	set -euo pipefail
442	${z_sudo_prefix}mkdir -p   '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
443	${z_sudo_prefix}chmod 700  '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
444	echo '${z_authkeys_line}' | ${z_sudo_prefix}tee '${z_wlhome}/.ssh/authorized_keys' > /dev/null
445	${z_sudo_prefix}chmod 600  '${z_wlhome}/.ssh/authorized_keys'
446	${z_sudo_prefix}chown -R '${z_wlu}:${z_wlu}' '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
447	SCRIPT
448	      ;;
449	    c)
450	      # In Cygwin, file ownership/permissions interplay with NTFS ACLs.
451	      # mkdir/chmod/chown are Cygwin-mediated; run as the admin user
452	      # without sudo (Windows admins already have privilege).
453	      zbujb_admin_exec c <<SCRIPT
454	set -euo pipefail
455	mkdir -p   '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
456	chmod 700  '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
457	echo '${z_authkeys_line}' > '${z_wlhome}/.ssh/authorized_keys'
458	chmod 600  '${z_wlhome}/.ssh/authorized_keys'
459	chown -R '${z_wlu}' '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
460	SCRIPT
461	      ;;
462	  esac
463	}
464	
465	# Step 5 -- copy workload privkey to the remote at the shell-letter's
466	# hardcoded destination path, with workload ownership and 0600 mode.
467	zbujb_garrison_step5_plant_key() {
468	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
469	  local z_wlu="${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
470	  local z_wlhome
471	  z_wlhome=$(zbujb_workload_home_capture "${z_letter}") \
472	    || buc_die "step5: workload home unresolvable for letter='${z_letter}' platform='${BURN_PLATFORM}'"
473	  local z_keypath
474	  z_keypath=$(bujb_workload_keypath_for_capture "${z_letter}") \
475	    || buc_die "step5: bujb_workload_keypath_for_capture failed for letter='${z_letter}'"
476	  local z_target="${z_wlhome}/${z_keypath}"
477	  local z_target_dir="${z_target%/*}"  # parameter expansion replaces dirname
478	  buc_step "  [5/6] Plant workload privkey (${z_target})"
479	
480	  openssl enc -base64 -A < "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}" \
481	      > "${ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDOUT}" \
482	      2> "${ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDERR}" \
483	    || buc_die "base64 encode failed for workload key: ${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE} — see ${ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDERR}"
484	  local z_key_b64
485	  z_key_b64=$(<"${ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDOUT}")
486	  z_key_b64="${z_key_b64//$'\n'/}"
487	
488	  local z_sudo_prefix=""
489	  test "${z_letter}" = "b" && z_sudo_prefix="sudo -n "
490	
491	  case "${z_letter}" in
492	    b|w)
493	      zbujb_admin_exec "${z_letter}" <<SCRIPT
494	set -euo pipefail
495	ztmp=\$(mktemp)
496	trap 'rm -f "\${ztmp}"' EXIT
497	echo '${z_key_b64}' | openssl enc -base64 -d -A > "\${ztmp}"
498	${z_sudo_prefix}mkdir -p   '${z_target_dir}'
499	${z_sudo_prefix}install -m 600 -o '${z_wlu}' -g '${z_wlu}' "\${ztmp}" '${z_target}'
500	SCRIPT
501	      ;;
502	    c)
503	      zbujb_admin_exec c <<SCRIPT
504	set -euo pipefail
505	ztmp=\$(mktemp)
506	trap 'rm -f "\${ztmp}"' EXIT
507	echo '${z_key_b64}' | openssl enc -base64 -d -A > "\${ztmp}"
508	mkdir -p   '${z_target_dir}'
509	cp "\${ztmp}" '${z_target}'
510	chmod 600  '${z_target}'
511	chown      '${z_wlu}' '${z_target}'
512	SCRIPT
513	      ;;
514	  esac
515	}
516	
517	# Step 6 -- workload-side round-trip validation (knock).
518	zbujb_garrison_step6_validate() {
519	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
520	  buc_step "  [6/6] Validate workload round-trip"
521	
522	  local z_exit=0
523	  ssh -i "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}"     \
524	      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                       \
525	      -o BatchMode=yes                            \
526	      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new         \
527	      -o ConnectTimeout=10                        \
528	      "${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
529	      true                                        \
530	    || z_exit=$?
531	
532	  test "${z_exit}" -eq 0 \
533	    || buc_die "Workload round-trip failed (ssh exit ${z_exit}); the new account did not accept its own key."
534	}
535	
536	######################################################################
537	# Public: Garrison ceremony
538	
539	# bujb_garrison LETTER -- run the 6-step garrison ceremony for shell-letter
540	# b, c, or w. Caller must have invoked bujb_resolve_investiture beforehand.
541	bujb_garrison() {
542	  zbujb_sentinel
543	  test "${ZBUJB_RESOLVED:-}" = "1" \
544	    || buc_die "bujb_garrison: call bujb_resolve_investiture first"
545	
546	  local z_letter="${1:-}"
547	  zbujb_garrison_assert_platform "${z_letter}"
548	
549	  buc_step "Garrison-${z_letter}: ${BURP_VICEROYALTY} (${BURN_HOST})"
550	
551	  zbujb_garrison_step1_admin_open    "${z_letter}"
552	  zbujb_garrison_step2_destroy       "${z_letter}"
553	  zbujb_garrison_step3_create        "${z_letter}"
554	  zbujb_garrison_step4_place_trust   "${z_letter}"
555	  zbujb_garrison_step5_plant_key     "${z_letter}"
556	  zbujb_garrison_step6_validate      "${z_letter}"
557	
558	  buc_step "Garrison-${z_letter} succeeded"
559	}
560	
561	######################################################################
562	# Internal: Fenestrate helpers (BUSJPF — Windows OpenSSH only)
563	#
564	# Each phase 1 chunk is a separate ssh call with publickey,password preferred
565	# auth. On a fresh node, chunk A's first publickey attempt fails and ssh
566	# falls through to /dev/tty password prompt — operator types once. After
567	# chunk A places the admin pubkey, chunk B's publickey attempt succeeds
568	# (the running sshd's old config still permits pubkey auth and now reads
569	# the updated authorized_keys), so no further prompt. Phase 2 is key-only.
570	# No ControlMaster, no traps, no 2>/dev/null.
571	
572	zbujb_fenestrate_assert_platform() {
573	  zbujb_sentinel
574	  test "${BURN_PLATFORM}" = "bubep_windows" \
575	    || buc_die "fenestrate requires bubep_windows, got '${BURN_PLATFORM}'"
576	}
577	
578	# zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback STDOUT_FILE STDERR_FILE
579	# Reads a PowerShell script from stdin and runs it on the remote node as
580	# the privileged user. publickey,password preferred (BatchMode=no allows
581	# /dev/tty password prompt on first run). Default Windows OpenSSH shell is
582	# cmd.exe; we explicitly invoke `powershell -NoProfile -File -` to feed
583	# the script via stdin. Returns ssh's exit code (caller decides).
584	zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback() {
585	  zbujb_sentinel
586	  local -r z_stdout_file="${1:-}"
587	  local -r z_stderr_file="${2:-}"
588	  test -n "${z_stdout_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback: stdout_file required"
589	  test -n "${z_stderr_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback: stderr_file required"
590	
591	  ssh -i "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}"            \
592	      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                                \
593	      -o BatchMode=no                                      \
594	      -o PreferredAuthentications=publickey,password       \
595	      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new                  \
596	      -o ConnectTimeout=15                                 \
597	      "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
598	      'powershell -NoProfile -File -'                      \
599	      > "${z_stdout_file}"                                 \
600	      2> "${z_stderr_file}"
601	}
602	
603	# zbujb_fenestrate_exec_keyonly STDOUT_FILE STDERR_FILE
604	# Same as above but BatchMode=yes (no password fallback). Used for phase 2.
605	zbujb_fenestrate_exec_keyonly() {
606	  zbujb_sentinel
607	  local -r z_stdout_file="${1:-}"
608	  local -r z_stderr_file="${2:-}"
609	  test -n "${z_stdout_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_exec_keyonly: stdout_file required"
610	  test -n "${z_stderr_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_exec_keyonly: stderr_file required"
611	
612	  ssh -i "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}"            \
613	      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                                \
614	      -o BatchMode=yes                                     \
615	      -o PreferredAuthentications=publickey                \
616	      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new                  \
617	      -o ConnectTimeout=15                                 \
618	      "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
619	      'powershell -NoProfile -File -'                      \
620	      > "${z_stdout_file}"                                 \
621	      2> "${z_stderr_file}"
622	}
623	
624	# zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives REMOTE_FILE -- load REMOTE_FILE (raw
625	# sshd_config bytes from PowerShell Get-Content), strip CR, then assert
626	# each directive in BUJB_sshd_hardening appears with the expected value.
627	# Load-then-iterate (no nested while-read on stdin); pure parameter
628	# expansion + case (no awk/grep/tr).
629	zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives() {
630	  zbujb_sentinel
631	  local -r z_remote_file="${1:-}"
632	  test -n "${z_remote_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives: remote_file required"
633	  test -f "${z_remote_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives: remote_file not found: ${z_remote_file}"
634	
635	  local -r z_raw_bytes=$(<"${z_remote_file}")
636	  test -n "${z_raw_bytes}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives: empty remote sshd_config bytes: ${z_remote_file}"
637	  local -r z_clean_bytes="${z_raw_bytes//$'\r'/}"
638	
639	  local z_directives_roll=()
640	  local z_pair=""
641	  while IFS= read -r z_pair || test -n "${z_pair}"; do
642	    test -n "${z_pair}" || continue
643	    z_directives_roll+=("${z_pair}")
644	  done <<<"${BUJB_sshd_hardening}"
645	
646	  local z_remote_lines_roll=()
647	  local z_line=""
648	  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
649	    z_remote_lines_roll+=("${z_line}")
650	  done <<<"${z_clean_bytes}"
651	
652	  local z_directive=""
653	  local z_expected=""
654	  local z_actual=""
655	  local z_after_directive=""
656	  local z_i=0
657	  local z_j=0
658	  for z_i in "${!z_directives_roll[@]}"; do
659	    z_directive="${z_directives_roll[$z_i]%% *}"
660	    z_expected="${z_directives_roll[$z_i]#* }"
661	    z_actual=""
662	
663	    for z_j in "${!z_remote_lines_roll[@]}"; do
664	      case "${z_remote_lines_roll[$z_j]}" in
665	        "${z_directive} "*)
666	          z_after_directive="${z_remote_lines_roll[$z_j]#"${z_directive} "}"
667	          z_actual="${z_after_directive%% *}"
668	          break
669	          ;;
670	      esac
671	    done
672	
673	    test -n "${z_actual}" \
674	      || buc_die "Hardening verify: directive '${z_directive}' missing or commented in remote sshd_config"
675	    test "${z_actual}" = "${z_expected}" \
676	      || buc_die "Hardening verify: ${z_directive}: expected '${z_expected}', got '${z_actual}'"
677	  done
678	}
679	
680	######################################################################
681	# Internal: Fenestrate phases
682	
683	# zbujb_fenestrate_phase1 -- chunk A (install admin pubkey idempotently +
684	# icacls + merge sshd_config hardening + sshd -t + emit raw bytes); bash-
685	# side parse + verify; then chunk B (Restart-Service sshd, disconnect
686	# expected — exit code ignored).
687	zbujb_fenestrate_phase1() {
688	  zbujb_sentinel
689	
690	  ssh-keygen -y -P '' -f "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}" \
691	      > "${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_PRIV}" \
692	      2> "${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_PRIV}" \
693	    || buc_die "ssh-keygen -y failed for admin key: ${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE} — see ${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_PRIV}"
694	  local z_pubkey
695	  z_pubkey=$(<"${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_PRIV}")
696	  z_pubkey="${z_pubkey//$'\n'/}"
697	
698	  buc_step "  [Phase 1] Chunk A: pubkey + icacls + sshd_config + sshd -t + emit (operator may be prompted for admin password on first run)"
699	
700	  zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback \
701	      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDOUT}"      \
702	      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDERR}"      \
703	    <<PS1 || buc_die "Phase 1 chunk A failed — admin pubkey/icacls/sshd_config/sshd -t did not all succeed; see ${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDERR}"
704	\$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
705	
706	\$pubkey = '${z_pubkey}'
707	\$adminAuthKeys = "\$env:ProgramData\\ssh\\administrators_authorized_keys"
708	\$sshConfig    = "\$env:ProgramData\\ssh\\sshd_config"
709	
710	# Idempotent admin pubkey install
711	if (-not (Test-Path \$adminAuthKeys)) {
712	  New-Item -Path \$adminAuthKeys -ItemType File -Force | Out-Null
713	}
714	\$existingLines = @(Get-Content \$adminAuthKeys -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
715	if (\$existingLines -notcontains \$pubkey) {
716	  Add-Content -Path \$adminAuthKeys -Value \$pubkey -Encoding ASCII
717	}
718	
719	# icacls lockdown (idempotent)
720	icacls \$adminAuthKeys /inheritance:r /grant 'SYSTEM:F' /grant 'BUILTIN\\Administrators:F' 2>&1 | Out-Null
721	if (\$LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw "icacls failed (exit \$LASTEXITCODE)" }
722	
723	# Idempotent sshd_config harden — replace the first matching line for
724	# each directive (commented or otherwise) and drop subsequent duplicates;
725	# append directives that are absent. Convergent on re-run.
726	\$directives = [ordered]@{
727	  'PubkeyAuthentication'   = 'yes'
728	  'PasswordAuthentication' = 'no'
729	  'PermitEmptyPasswords'   = 'no'
730	}
731	
732	\$lines = @(Get-Content \$sshConfig)
733	\$out   = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]
734	\$seen  = @{}
735	foreach (\$line in \$lines) {
736	  \$matched = \$false
737	  foreach (\$k in \$directives.Keys) {
738	    if (\$line -match "^\\s*#*\\s*\$k\\s+\\S") {
739	      if (-not \$seen.ContainsKey(\$k)) {
740	        \$out.Add("\$k \$(\$directives[\$k])")
741	        \$seen[\$k] = \$true
742	      }
743	      \$matched = \$true
744	      break
745	    }
746	  }
747	  if (-not \$matched) { \$out.Add(\$line) }
748	}
749	foreach (\$k in \$directives.Keys) {
750	  if (-not \$seen.ContainsKey(\$k)) { \$out.Add("\$k \$(\$directives[\$k])") }
751	}
752	Set-Content -Path \$sshConfig -Value \$out -Encoding ASCII
753	
754	# sshd -t — penultimate atomic op; aborts before restart on bad config
755	& 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\OpenSSH\\sshd.exe' -t
756	if (\$LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw "sshd -t failed (exit \$LASTEXITCODE)" }
757	
758	# Emit raw bytes for bash-side parse (last op so output is clean)
759	Get-Content \$sshConfig -Raw
760	PS1
761	
762	  buc_step "  [Phase 1] Verify hardened directives via bash-side parse"
763	  zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDOUT}"
764	
765	  buc_step "  [Phase 1] Chunk B: Restart-Service sshd (disconnect expected — exit code ignored)"
766	  zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback \
767	      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_RESTART_STDOUT}"     \
768	      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_RESTART_STDERR}"     \
769	    <<'PS1' || true
770	$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
771	Restart-Service sshd
772	PS1
773	}
774	
775	# zbujb_fenestrate_phase2 -- reconnect via key-only auth and re-verify the
776	# hardened directives served by the running sshd.
777	zbujb_fenestrate_phase2() {
778	  zbujb_sentinel
779	
780	  buc_step "  [Phase 2] Reconnect under key-only auth + re-verify"
781	
782	  # Allow sshd a moment to come back from Restart-Service.
783	  sleep 3
784	
785	  zbujb_fenestrate_exec_keyonly                 \
786	      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDOUT}"       \
787	      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDERR}"       \
788	    <<'PS1' || buc_die "Phase 2 reconnect failed — possible brick: admin pubkey not honored after restart or sshd did not come back up; see ${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDERR}"
789	$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
790	Get-Content "$env:ProgramData\ssh\sshd_config" -Raw
791	PS1
792	
793	  zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDOUT}"
794	}
795	
796	######################################################################
797	# Public: Fenestrate ceremony
798	
799	# bujb_fenestrate -- run the two-phase fenestrate ceremony for a Windows
800	# OpenSSH node. Caller must have invoked bujb_resolve_investiture beforehand.
801	bujb_fenestrate() {
802	  zbujb_sentinel
803	  test "${ZBUJB_RESOLVED:-}" = "1" \
804	    || buc_die "bujb_fenestrate: call bujb_resolve_investiture first"
805	
806	  zbujb_fenestrate_assert_platform
807	
808	  buc_step "Fenestrate: ${BURP_VICEROYALTY} (${BURN_HOST})"
809	
810	  zbujb_fenestrate_phase1
811	  zbujb_fenestrate_phase2
812	
813	  buc_step "Fenestrate succeeded"
814	}
815	
816	# eof
817

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# BUJB Jurisdiction Module - Implementation seat for fenestrate + garrison
#
# BCG-compliant module housing both BUS0 jurisdiction verbs (fenestrate,
# garrison) and the contracts not expressed in regime data:
# the three shell-letter -> command= directive mappings (b/c/w),
# the workload privkey destination paths on the remote per shell-letter,
# the canonical WSL distribution name, and the Windows OpenSSH sshd_config
# hardening directive set.
#
# Sub-letter b in bujb signals the bash-format implementation. A future
# PowerShell sibling would mint as bujp_jurisdiction.ps1.

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZBUJB_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module bujb multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZBUJB_SOURCED=1

# Tinder constants (pure string literals — available at source time)

# Shell-letter -> command= directive mappings.
# Forced commands routed through SSH_ORIGINAL_COMMAND keep workload account
# behaviour pinned to the chosen shell regardless of what the SSH client
# requests. Locked spec content; mirrored in BUSJG{B,C,W}.
BUJB_command_b='command="/bin/bash -lc \"$SSH_ORIGINAL_COMMAND\"",no-port-forwarding,no-X11-forwarding,no-agent-forwarding'
BUJB_command_c='command="C:/cygwin64/bin/bash --login -c \"$SSH_ORIGINAL_COMMAND\"",no-port-forwarding,no-X11-forwarding,no-agent-forwarding'
BUJB_command_w='command="C:/Windows/System32/wsl.exe --distribution rbtww-main --exec /bin/bash -lc \"$SSH_ORIGINAL_COMMAND\"",no-port-forwarding,no-X11-forwarding,no-agent-forwarding'

# Shell-letter -> workload privkey destination path on the remote
# (relative to the workload account home directory).
BUJB_workload_keypath_b='.ssh/id_ed25519'
BUJB_workload_keypath_c='.ssh/id_ed25519'
BUJB_workload_keypath_w='.ssh/id_ed25519'

# Canonical WSL distribution name reached by garrison-w.
BUJB_wsl_distribution='rbtww-main'

# Windows OpenSSH sshd_config hardening directive set written by
# fenestrate phase 1. Newline-joined; each directive is asserted by
# bash-side parse after PowerShell Get-Content returns the raw bytes.
BUJB_sshd_hardening='PubkeyAuthentication yes
PasswordAuthentication no
PermitEmptyPasswords no'

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zbujb_*)

zbujb_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZBUJB_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module bujb already kindled"

  # Fenestrate temp file paths — ssh stdout/stderr captured here so
  # callers parse from disk (no `$(ssh ...)` capture).
  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDOUT="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_phase1_stdout.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDERR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_phase1_stderr.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_RESTART_STDOUT="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_restart_stdout.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_RESTART_STDERR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_restart_stderr.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDOUT="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_phase2_stdout.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDERR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_fenestrate_phase2_stderr.txt"

  # stat captures (per-key-slot for parallel forensics on resolve).
  readonly ZBUJB_STAT_STDOUT_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_stat_priv_stdout.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_STAT_STDERR_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_stat_priv_stderr.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_STAT_STDOUT_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_stat_work_stdout.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_STAT_STDERR_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_stat_work_stderr.txt"

  # ssh-keygen dry-load captures (resolve-time, per slot).
  readonly ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDOUT_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_dryload_priv_stdout.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDERR_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_dryload_priv_stderr.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDOUT_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_dryload_work_stdout.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDERR_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_dryload_work_stderr.txt"

  # ssh-keygen pubkey-emit captures (garrison step4 = workload pubkey,
  # fenestrate phase1 = admin pubkey).
  readonly ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_pubkey_work_stdout.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_WORK="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_pubkey_work_stderr.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_pubkey_priv_stdout.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_PRIV="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_pubkey_priv_stderr.txt"

  # base64 capture (garrison step5 = workload privkey b64-encoded for
  # heredoc transport to remote).
  readonly ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDOUT="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_key_b64_stdout.txt"
  readonly ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDERR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/bujb_key_b64_stderr.txt"

  readonly ZBUJB_KINDLED=1
}

zbujb_sentinel() {
  test "${ZBUJB_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module bujb not kindled - call zbujb_kindle first"
}

# zbujb_check_key_file PATH VARNAME SLOT -- validate SSH private key at PATH:
# exists, mode 0600, parseable + unencrypted (ssh-keygen -y dry-load with
# empty passphrase). Diagnostic uses VARNAME as the field label. SLOT
# (priv|work) selects the kindle temp-file pair used for stat + dry-load
# stdout/stderr capture so failures preserve forensic evidence per BCG.
zbujb_check_key_file() {
  local z_path="${1:-}"
  local z_varname="${2:-}"
  local z_slot="${3:-}"

  test -n "${z_path}"    || buc_die "${z_varname}: empty path"
  test -f "${z_path}"    || buc_die "${z_varname}: file not found: ${z_path}"

  local z_stat_stdout="" z_stat_stderr="" z_dry_stdout="" z_dry_stderr=""
  case "${z_slot}" in
    priv)
      z_stat_stdout="${ZBUJB_STAT_STDOUT_PRIV}"
      z_stat_stderr="${ZBUJB_STAT_STDERR_PRIV}"
      z_dry_stdout="${ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDOUT_PRIV}"
      z_dry_stderr="${ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDERR_PRIV}"
      ;;
    work)
      z_stat_stdout="${ZBUJB_STAT_STDOUT_WORK}"
      z_stat_stderr="${ZBUJB_STAT_STDERR_WORK}"
      z_dry_stdout="${ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDOUT_WORK}"
      z_dry_stderr="${ZBUJB_DRYLOAD_STDERR_WORK}"
      ;;
    *)
      buc_die "zbujb_check_key_file: invalid slot (expected priv|work): '${z_slot}'"
      ;;
  esac

  # BSD stat first (Mac), GNU stat fallback (Linux). The failed flavor's
  # stderr is overwritten by the successful flavor's invocation; on total
  # failure z_stat_stderr holds the GNU-attempt error.
  if stat -f '%A' "${z_path}" > "${z_stat_stdout}" 2> "${z_stat_stderr}"; then
    : # macOS / BSD stat succeeded
  elif stat -c '%a' "${z_path}" > "${z_stat_stdout}" 2> "${z_stat_stderr}"; then
    : # GNU/Linux stat succeeded
  else
    buc_die "${z_varname}: cannot stat ${z_path} — see ${z_stat_stderr}"
  fi

  local z_mode
  z_mode=$(<"${z_stat_stdout}")
  z_mode="${z_mode//$'\n'/}"
  test "${z_mode}" = "600" \
    || buc_die "${z_varname}: mode must be 0600, got ${z_mode}: ${z_path}"

  ssh-keygen -y -P '' -f "${z_path}" \
      > "${z_dry_stdout}" \
      2> "${z_dry_stderr}" \
    || buc_die "${z_varname}: ssh-keygen -y dry-load failed (passphrase-protected or malformed): ${z_path} — see ${z_dry_stderr}"
}

######################################################################
# Public Functions (bujb_*)

# bujb_resolve_investiture -- sole runtime cross-validation entrypoint.
#
# Preconditions: BURC, BURN, BURP regimes already kindled and enforced
# (the bujb_cli furnish handles this for tabtarget callers; the cli's
# BURP and BURN sourcing also implicitly cross-validates that
# BURP_VICEROYALTY refers to a registered BURN profile by file presence).
#
# Behaviour: validates BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE and BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE
# (exist, mode 0600, ssh-keygen -y dry-load proves parseable + unencrypted) —
# the validation regime enforce cannot do because it requires running
# ssh-keygen against the private key. After validation, sets ZBUJB_RESOLVED=1
# as the I-have-been-validated sentinel. Callers reference the regime vars
# directly (BURP_*, BURN_*, BURC_*); no separate published namespace.
# Single-call-per-process; subsequent calls die.
bujb_resolve_investiture() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  zburc_sentinel
  zburn_sentinel
  zburp_sentinel

  test -z "${ZBUJB_RESOLVED:-}" \
    || buc_die "bujb_resolve_investiture already called - single-call-per-process"

  zbujb_check_key_file "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}" "BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE" priv
  zbujb_check_key_file "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}"   "BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE"   work

  readonly ZBUJB_RESOLVED=1
}

# bujb_command_for_capture SHELL_LETTER -- emit the workload authorized_keys
# command= directive for shell-letter b, c, or w. _capture form so callers
# may use `$()` per BCG line 502; returns 1 on invalid letter, callers must
# `|| buc_die`.
bujb_command_for_capture() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  case "${z_letter}" in
    b) echo "${BUJB_command_b}" ;;
    c) echo "${BUJB_command_c}" ;;
    w) echo "${BUJB_command_w}" ;;
    *) return 1 ;;
  esac
}

# bujb_workload_keypath_for_capture SHELL_LETTER -- emit the workload privkey
# remote destination path (relative to workload home) for b, c, or w.
# Returns 1 on invalid letter; callers must `|| buc_die`.
bujb_workload_keypath_for_capture() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  case "${z_letter}" in
    b) echo "${BUJB_workload_keypath_b}" ;;
    c) echo "${BUJB_workload_keypath_c}" ;;
    w) echo "${BUJB_workload_keypath_w}" ;;
    *) return 1 ;;
  esac
}

######################################################################
# Internal: Garrison helpers

zbujb_assert_shell_letter() {
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  case "${z_letter}" in
    b|c|w) ;;
    *) buc_die "Invalid shell-letter (expected b/c/w): '${z_letter}'" ;;
  esac
}

# zbujb_garrison_assert_platform LETTER -- assert BURN_PLATFORM
# matches the shell-letter's required platform set.
zbujb_garrison_assert_platform() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  zbujb_assert_shell_letter "${z_letter}"
  case "${z_letter}" in
    b)
      case "${BURN_PLATFORM}" in
        bubep_linux|bubep_mac) ;;
        *) buc_die "garrison-b requires bubep_linux or bubep_mac, got '${BURN_PLATFORM}'" ;;
      esac
      ;;
    c|w)
      test "${BURN_PLATFORM}" = "bubep_windows" \
        || buc_die "garrison-${z_letter} requires bubep_windows, got '${BURN_PLATFORM}'"
      ;;
  esac
}

# zbujb_workload_home_capture LETTER -- emit the absolute workload home path
# on the remote node for the given shell-letter. _capture form per BCG line
# 502; returns 1 on unsupported platform or invalid letter, callers must
# `|| buc_die`.
zbujb_workload_home_capture() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  local z_wlu="${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
  case "${z_letter}" in
    b)
      case "${BURN_PLATFORM}" in
        bubep_linux) echo "/home/${z_wlu}" ;;
        bubep_mac)   echo "/Users/${z_wlu}" ;;
        *)           return 1 ;;
      esac
      ;;
    c|w) echo "/home/${z_wlu}" ;;
    *)   return 1 ;;
  esac
}

# zbujb_admin_exec LETTER -- read a bash script from stdin and execute it on
# the remote node as the privileged user, wrapped in the shell-letter-
# appropriate invocation (native bash for b; Cygwin's bash --login for c;
# wsl.exe to BUJB_wsl_distribution as root for w).
zbujb_admin_exec() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  zbujb_assert_shell_letter "${z_letter}"

  local z_remote_invoker
  case "${z_letter}" in
    b) z_remote_invoker='bash -s' ;;
    c) z_remote_invoker='C:/cygwin64/bin/bash --login -s' ;;
    w) z_remote_invoker="wsl.exe --distribution ${BUJB_wsl_distribution} --user root bash -s" ;;
  esac

  ssh -i "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}"     \
      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                         \
      -o BatchMode=yes                              \
      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new           \
      -o ConnectTimeout=15                          \
      "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
      "${z_remote_invoker}"
}

######################################################################
# Internal: Garrison steps (6-step ceremony per BUSJG{B,C,W})

# Step 1 -- open admin SSH (test reachability under key-only auth).
zbujb_garrison_step1_admin_open() {
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  buc_step "  [1/6] Open admin SSH (${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}@${BURN_HOST})"

  local z_exit=0
  zbujb_admin_exec "${z_letter}" <<<'exit 0' || z_exit=$?
  if test "${z_exit}" -ne 0; then
    case "${BURN_PLATFORM}" in
      bubep_windows)
        buc_die "Admin SSH failed (exit ${z_exit}). Run fenestrate first: tt/buw-jpF.Fenestrate.sh ${BURP_VICEROYALTY}"
        ;;
      *)
        buc_die "Admin SSH failed (exit ${z_exit}). Place admin pubkey via 'ssh-copy-id -i ${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}.pub ${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}@${BURN_HOST}' first."
        ;;
    esac
  fi
}

# Step 2 -- destroy any existing workload account + home.
zbujb_garrison_step2_destroy() {
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  local z_wlu="${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
  local z_wlhome
  z_wlhome=$(zbujb_workload_home_capture "${z_letter}") \
    || buc_die "step2: workload home unresolvable for letter='${z_letter}' platform='${BURN_PLATFORM}'"
  buc_step "  [2/6] Destroy workload (${z_wlu})"

  case "${z_letter}" in
    b)
      zbujb_admin_exec b <<SCRIPT
set -uo pipefail
sudo -n userdel -r '${z_wlu}' 2>/dev/null || true
sudo -n rm -rf '${z_wlhome}' 2>/dev/null || true
SCRIPT
      ;;
    c)
      # Cygwin workload is a Windows local user; delete via net.exe then
      # purge the Cygwin home directory.
      zbujb_admin_exec c <<SCRIPT
set -uo pipefail
net.exe user '${z_wlu}' /delete > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
rm -rf '${z_wlhome}'                              2>/dev/null || true
rm -rf '/cygdrive/c/cygwin64/home/${z_wlu}'       2>/dev/null || true
SCRIPT
      ;;
    w)
      zbujb_admin_exec w <<SCRIPT
set -uo pipefail
userdel -r '${z_wlu}' 2>/dev/null || true
rm -rf '${z_wlhome}'  2>/dev/null || true
SCRIPT
      ;;
  esac
}

# Step 3 -- create the workload account fresh, ssh-only, no privilege.
zbujb_garrison_step3_create() {
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  local z_wlu="${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
  buc_step "  [3/6] Create workload (${z_wlu})"

  case "${z_letter}" in
    b)
      case "${BURN_PLATFORM}" in
        bubep_linux)
          zbujb_admin_exec b <<SCRIPT
set -euo pipefail
sudo -n useradd --create-home --shell /bin/bash '${z_wlu}'
sudo -n passwd  --lock '${z_wlu}'
SCRIPT
          ;;
        bubep_mac)
          # Mac uses dscl/sysadminctl; left for in-environment refinement.
          # Operator may need to seat a more idiomatic primary group ID.
          zbujb_admin_exec b <<SCRIPT
set -euo pipefail
sudo -n sysadminctl -addUser '${z_wlu}' -roleAccount
sudo -n dscl . -create '/Users/${z_wlu}' UserShell /bin/bash
SCRIPT
          ;;
      esac
      ;;
    c)
      # Cygwin reflects Windows user accounts; mint via net.exe with a
      # disabled-password posture (we want ssh-key-only).
      zbujb_admin_exec c <<SCRIPT
set -euo pipefail
net.exe user '${z_wlu}' /add /passwordreq:no /active:yes > /dev/null
mkpasswd -l -u '${z_wlu}' >> /etc/passwd
mkdir -p '/home/${z_wlu}'
chown -R '${z_wlu}' '/home/${z_wlu}'
SCRIPT
      ;;
    w)
      zbujb_admin_exec w <<SCRIPT
set -euo pipefail
useradd --create-home --shell /bin/bash '${z_wlu}'
passwd  --lock '${z_wlu}'
SCRIPT
      ;;
  esac
}

# Step 4 -- write workload authorized_keys with the shell-letter command=
# directive and the workload pubkey (derived locally from the privkey).
zbujb_garrison_step4_place_trust() {
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  local z_wlu="${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
  local z_wlhome
  z_wlhome=$(zbujb_workload_home_capture "${z_letter}") \
    || buc_die "step4: workload home unresolvable for letter='${z_letter}' platform='${BURN_PLATFORM}'"
  buc_step "  [4/6] Place workload trust (${z_wlhome}/.ssh/authorized_keys)"

  local z_command_directive
  z_command_directive=$(bujb_command_for_capture "${z_letter}") \
    || buc_die "step4: bujb_command_for_capture failed for letter='${z_letter}'"

  ssh-keygen -y -P '' -f "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}" \
      > "${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_WORK}" \
      2> "${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_WORK}" \
    || buc_die "ssh-keygen -y failed for workload key: ${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE} — see ${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_WORK}"
  local z_pubkey
  z_pubkey=$(<"${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_WORK}")
  z_pubkey="${z_pubkey//$'\n'/}"

  local z_authkeys_line="${z_command_directive} ${z_pubkey}"

  # Precompute sudo prefix locally (bash parameter expansion, no $()) so the
  # heredoc lines don't carry inline `$([ ... ] && echo "sudo -n ")` calls.
  local z_sudo_prefix=""
  test "${z_letter}" = "b" && z_sudo_prefix="sudo -n "

  case "${z_letter}" in
    b|w)
      zbujb_admin_exec "${z_letter}" <<SCRIPT
set -euo pipefail
${z_sudo_prefix}mkdir -p   '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
${z_sudo_prefix}chmod 700  '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
echo '${z_authkeys_line}' | ${z_sudo_prefix}tee '${z_wlhome}/.ssh/authorized_keys' > /dev/null
${z_sudo_prefix}chmod 600  '${z_wlhome}/.ssh/authorized_keys'
${z_sudo_prefix}chown -R '${z_wlu}:${z_wlu}' '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
SCRIPT
      ;;
    c)
      # In Cygwin, file ownership/permissions interplay with NTFS ACLs.
      # mkdir/chmod/chown are Cygwin-mediated; run as the admin user
      # without sudo (Windows admins already have privilege).
      zbujb_admin_exec c <<SCRIPT
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p   '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
chmod 700  '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
echo '${z_authkeys_line}' > '${z_wlhome}/.ssh/authorized_keys'
chmod 600  '${z_wlhome}/.ssh/authorized_keys'
chown -R '${z_wlu}' '${z_wlhome}/.ssh'
SCRIPT
      ;;
  esac
}

# Step 5 -- copy workload privkey to the remote at the shell-letter's
# hardcoded destination path, with workload ownership and 0600 mode.
zbujb_garrison_step5_plant_key() {
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  local z_wlu="${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
  local z_wlhome
  z_wlhome=$(zbujb_workload_home_capture "${z_letter}") \
    || buc_die "step5: workload home unresolvable for letter='${z_letter}' platform='${BURN_PLATFORM}'"
  local z_keypath
  z_keypath=$(bujb_workload_keypath_for_capture "${z_letter}") \
    || buc_die "step5: bujb_workload_keypath_for_capture failed for letter='${z_letter}'"
  local z_target="${z_wlhome}/${z_keypath}"
  local z_target_dir="${z_target%/*}"  # parameter expansion replaces dirname
  buc_step "  [5/6] Plant workload privkey (${z_target})"

  openssl enc -base64 -A < "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}" \
      > "${ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDOUT}" \
      2> "${ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDERR}" \
    || buc_die "base64 encode failed for workload key: ${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE} — see ${ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDERR}"
  local z_key_b64
  z_key_b64=$(<"${ZBUJB_KEY_B64_STDOUT}")
  z_key_b64="${z_key_b64//$'\n'/}"

  local z_sudo_prefix=""
  test "${z_letter}" = "b" && z_sudo_prefix="sudo -n "

  case "${z_letter}" in
    b|w)
      zbujb_admin_exec "${z_letter}" <<SCRIPT
set -euo pipefail
ztmp=\$(mktemp)
trap 'rm -f "\${ztmp}"' EXIT
echo '${z_key_b64}' | openssl enc -base64 -d -A > "\${ztmp}"
${z_sudo_prefix}mkdir -p   '${z_target_dir}'
${z_sudo_prefix}install -m 600 -o '${z_wlu}' -g '${z_wlu}' "\${ztmp}" '${z_target}'
SCRIPT
      ;;
    c)
      zbujb_admin_exec c <<SCRIPT
set -euo pipefail
ztmp=\$(mktemp)
trap 'rm -f "\${ztmp}"' EXIT
echo '${z_key_b64}' | openssl enc -base64 -d -A > "\${ztmp}"
mkdir -p   '${z_target_dir}'
cp "\${ztmp}" '${z_target}'
chmod 600  '${z_target}'
chown      '${z_wlu}' '${z_target}'
SCRIPT
      ;;
  esac
}

# Step 6 -- workload-side round-trip validation (knock).
zbujb_garrison_step6_validate() {
  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  buc_step "  [6/6] Validate workload round-trip"

  local z_exit=0
  ssh -i "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}"     \
      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                       \
      -o BatchMode=yes                            \
      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new         \
      -o ConnectTimeout=10                        \
      "${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
      true                                        \
    || z_exit=$?

  test "${z_exit}" -eq 0 \
    || buc_die "Workload round-trip failed (ssh exit ${z_exit}); the new account did not accept its own key."
}

######################################################################
# Public: Garrison ceremony

# bujb_garrison LETTER -- run the 6-step garrison ceremony for shell-letter
# b, c, or w. Caller must have invoked bujb_resolve_investiture beforehand.
bujb_garrison() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  test "${ZBUJB_RESOLVED:-}" = "1" \
    || buc_die "bujb_garrison: call bujb_resolve_investiture first"

  local z_letter="${1:-}"
  zbujb_garrison_assert_platform "${z_letter}"

  buc_step "Garrison-${z_letter}: ${BURP_VICEROYALTY} (${BURN_HOST})"

  zbujb_garrison_step1_admin_open    "${z_letter}"
  zbujb_garrison_step2_destroy       "${z_letter}"
  zbujb_garrison_step3_create        "${z_letter}"
  zbujb_garrison_step4_place_trust   "${z_letter}"
  zbujb_garrison_step5_plant_key     "${z_letter}"
  zbujb_garrison_step6_validate      "${z_letter}"

  buc_step "Garrison-${z_letter} succeeded"
}

######################################################################
# Internal: Fenestrate helpers (BUSJPF — Windows OpenSSH only)
#
# Each phase 1 chunk is a separate ssh call with publickey,password preferred
# auth. On a fresh node, chunk A's first publickey attempt fails and ssh
# falls through to /dev/tty password prompt — operator types once. After
# chunk A places the admin pubkey, chunk B's publickey attempt succeeds
# (the running sshd's old config still permits pubkey auth and now reads
# the updated authorized_keys), so no further prompt. Phase 2 is key-only.
# No ControlMaster, no traps, no 2>/dev/null.

zbujb_fenestrate_assert_platform() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  test "${BURN_PLATFORM}" = "bubep_windows" \
    || buc_die "fenestrate requires bubep_windows, got '${BURN_PLATFORM}'"
}

# zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback STDOUT_FILE STDERR_FILE
# Reads a PowerShell script from stdin and runs it on the remote node as
# the privileged user. publickey,password preferred (BatchMode=no allows
# /dev/tty password prompt on first run). Default Windows OpenSSH shell is
# cmd.exe; we explicitly invoke `powershell -NoProfile -File -` to feed
# the script via stdin. Returns ssh's exit code (caller decides).
zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  local -r z_stdout_file="${1:-}"
  local -r z_stderr_file="${2:-}"
  test -n "${z_stdout_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback: stdout_file required"
  test -n "${z_stderr_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback: stderr_file required"

  ssh -i "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}"            \
      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                                \
      -o BatchMode=no                                      \
      -o PreferredAuthentications=publickey,password       \
      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new                  \
      -o ConnectTimeout=15                                 \
      "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
      'powershell -NoProfile -File -'                      \
      > "${z_stdout_file}"                                 \
      2> "${z_stderr_file}"
}

# zbujb_fenestrate_exec_keyonly STDOUT_FILE STDERR_FILE
# Same as above but BatchMode=yes (no password fallback). Used for phase 2.
zbujb_fenestrate_exec_keyonly() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  local -r z_stdout_file="${1:-}"
  local -r z_stderr_file="${2:-}"
  test -n "${z_stdout_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_exec_keyonly: stdout_file required"
  test -n "${z_stderr_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_exec_keyonly: stderr_file required"

  ssh -i "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}"            \
      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                                \
      -o BatchMode=yes                                     \
      -o PreferredAuthentications=publickey                \
      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new                  \
      -o ConnectTimeout=15                                 \
      "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
      'powershell -NoProfile -File -'                      \
      > "${z_stdout_file}"                                 \
      2> "${z_stderr_file}"
}

# zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives REMOTE_FILE -- load REMOTE_FILE (raw
# sshd_config bytes from PowerShell Get-Content), strip CR, then assert
# each directive in BUJB_sshd_hardening appears with the expected value.
# Load-then-iterate (no nested while-read on stdin); pure parameter
# expansion + case (no awk/grep/tr).
zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  local -r z_remote_file="${1:-}"
  test -n "${z_remote_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives: remote_file required"
  test -f "${z_remote_file}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives: remote_file not found: ${z_remote_file}"

  local -r z_raw_bytes=$(<"${z_remote_file}")
  test -n "${z_raw_bytes}" || buc_die "zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives: empty remote sshd_config bytes: ${z_remote_file}"
  local -r z_clean_bytes="${z_raw_bytes//$'\r'/}"

  local z_directives_roll=()
  local z_pair=""
  while IFS= read -r z_pair || test -n "${z_pair}"; do
    test -n "${z_pair}" || continue
    z_directives_roll+=("${z_pair}")
  done <<<"${BUJB_sshd_hardening}"

  local z_remote_lines_roll=()
  local z_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    z_remote_lines_roll+=("${z_line}")
  done <<<"${z_clean_bytes}"

  local z_directive=""
  local z_expected=""
  local z_actual=""
  local z_after_directive=""
  local z_i=0
  local z_j=0
  for z_i in "${!z_directives_roll[@]}"; do
    z_directive="${z_directives_roll[$z_i]%% *}"
    z_expected="${z_directives_roll[$z_i]#* }"
    z_actual=""

    for z_j in "${!z_remote_lines_roll[@]}"; do
      case "${z_remote_lines_roll[$z_j]}" in
        "${z_directive} "*)
          z_after_directive="${z_remote_lines_roll[$z_j]#"${z_directive} "}"
          z_actual="${z_after_directive%% *}"
          break
          ;;
      esac
    done

    test -n "${z_actual}" \
      || buc_die "Hardening verify: directive '${z_directive}' missing or commented in remote sshd_config"
    test "${z_actual}" = "${z_expected}" \
      || buc_die "Hardening verify: ${z_directive}: expected '${z_expected}', got '${z_actual}'"
  done
}

######################################################################
# Internal: Fenestrate phases

# zbujb_fenestrate_phase1 -- chunk A (install admin pubkey idempotently +
# icacls + merge sshd_config hardening + sshd -t + emit raw bytes); bash-
# side parse + verify; then chunk B (Restart-Service sshd, disconnect
# expected — exit code ignored).
zbujb_fenestrate_phase1() {
  zbujb_sentinel

  ssh-keygen -y -P '' -f "${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}" \
      > "${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_PRIV}" \
      2> "${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_PRIV}" \
    || buc_die "ssh-keygen -y failed for admin key: ${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE} — see ${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDERR_PRIV}"
  local z_pubkey
  z_pubkey=$(<"${ZBUJB_PUBKEY_STDOUT_PRIV}")
  z_pubkey="${z_pubkey//$'\n'/}"

  buc_step "  [Phase 1] Chunk A: pubkey + icacls + sshd_config + sshd -t + emit (operator may be prompted for admin password on first run)"

  zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback \
      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDOUT}"      \
      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDERR}"      \
    <<PS1 || buc_die "Phase 1 chunk A failed — admin pubkey/icacls/sshd_config/sshd -t did not all succeed; see ${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDERR}"
\$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

\$pubkey = '${z_pubkey}'
\$adminAuthKeys = "\$env:ProgramData\\ssh\\administrators_authorized_keys"
\$sshConfig    = "\$env:ProgramData\\ssh\\sshd_config"

# Idempotent admin pubkey install
if (-not (Test-Path \$adminAuthKeys)) {
  New-Item -Path \$adminAuthKeys -ItemType File -Force | Out-Null
}
\$existingLines = @(Get-Content \$adminAuthKeys -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
if (\$existingLines -notcontains \$pubkey) {
  Add-Content -Path \$adminAuthKeys -Value \$pubkey -Encoding ASCII
}

# icacls lockdown (idempotent)
icacls \$adminAuthKeys /inheritance:r /grant 'SYSTEM:F' /grant 'BUILTIN\\Administrators:F' 2>&1 | Out-Null
if (\$LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw "icacls failed (exit \$LASTEXITCODE)" }

# Idempotent sshd_config harden — replace the first matching line for
# each directive (commented or otherwise) and drop subsequent duplicates;
# append directives that are absent. Convergent on re-run.
\$directives = [ordered]@{
  'PubkeyAuthentication'   = 'yes'
  'PasswordAuthentication' = 'no'
  'PermitEmptyPasswords'   = 'no'
}

\$lines = @(Get-Content \$sshConfig)
\$out   = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]
\$seen  = @{}
foreach (\$line in \$lines) {
  \$matched = \$false
  foreach (\$k in \$directives.Keys) {
    if (\$line -match "^\\s*#*\\s*\$k\\s+\\S") {
      if (-not \$seen.ContainsKey(\$k)) {
        \$out.Add("\$k \$(\$directives[\$k])")
        \$seen[\$k] = \$true
      }
      \$matched = \$true
      break
    }
  }
  if (-not \$matched) { \$out.Add(\$line) }
}
foreach (\$k in \$directives.Keys) {
  if (-not \$seen.ContainsKey(\$k)) { \$out.Add("\$k \$(\$directives[\$k])") }
}
Set-Content -Path \$sshConfig -Value \$out -Encoding ASCII

# sshd -t — penultimate atomic op; aborts before restart on bad config
& 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\OpenSSH\\sshd.exe' -t
if (\$LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw "sshd -t failed (exit \$LASTEXITCODE)" }

# Emit raw bytes for bash-side parse (last op so output is clean)
Get-Content \$sshConfig -Raw
PS1

  buc_step "  [Phase 1] Verify hardened directives via bash-side parse"
  zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE1_STDOUT}"

  buc_step "  [Phase 1] Chunk B: Restart-Service sshd (disconnect expected — exit code ignored)"
  zbujb_fenestrate_exec_with_password_fallback \
      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_RESTART_STDOUT}"     \
      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_RESTART_STDERR}"     \
    <<'PS1' || true
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
Restart-Service sshd
PS1
}

# zbujb_fenestrate_phase2 -- reconnect via key-only auth and re-verify the
# hardened directives served by the running sshd.
zbujb_fenestrate_phase2() {
  zbujb_sentinel

  buc_step "  [Phase 2] Reconnect under key-only auth + re-verify"

  # Allow sshd a moment to come back from Restart-Service.
  sleep 3

  zbujb_fenestrate_exec_keyonly                 \
      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDOUT}"       \
      "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDERR}"       \
    <<'PS1' || buc_die "Phase 2 reconnect failed — possible brick: admin pubkey not honored after restart or sshd did not come back up; see ${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDERR}"
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
Get-Content "$env:ProgramData\ssh\sshd_config" -Raw
PS1

  zbujb_fenestrate_verify_directives "${ZBUJB_FENESTRATE_PHASE2_STDOUT}"
}

######################################################################
# Public: Fenestrate ceremony

# bujb_fenestrate -- run the two-phase fenestrate ceremony for a Windows
# OpenSSH node. Caller must have invoked bujb_resolve_investiture beforehand.
bujb_fenestrate() {
  zbujb_sentinel
  test "${ZBUJB_RESOLVED:-}" = "1" \
    || buc_die "bujb_fenestrate: call bujb_resolve_investiture first"

  zbujb_fenestrate_assert_platform

  buc_step "Fenestrate: ${BURP_VICEROYALTY} (${BURN_HOST})"

  zbujb_fenestrate_phase1
  zbujb_fenestrate_phase2

  buc_step "Fenestrate succeeded"
}

# eof

18	#
19	# BUJB CLI - Command line interface for the jurisdiction module
20	#
21	# Furnish loads BURC, BURS, BURP (per investiture folio), and the cross-
22	# referenced BURN profile, then kindles bujb. Command functions call
23	# bujb_resolve_investiture before doing any work; per-verb platform
24	# invariants are asserted inline at the command body.
25	
26	set -euo pipefail
27	
28	source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
29	
30	######################################################################
31	# Command Functions
32	
33	# bujb_resolve - diagnostic: load investiture and print resolved fields.
34	# No remote action; verifies regime + key-file health for a target.
35	bujb_resolve() {
36	  buc_doc_brief "Cross-validate an investiture and display the regime fields it resolves"
37	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
38	
39	  test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}" || burp_die_no_folio
40	
41	  bujb_resolve_investiture
42	
43	  buc_step "Resolved investiture ${BUZ_FOLIO}:"
44	  buc_bare "  BURP_VICEROYALTY        = ${BURP_VICEROYALTY}"
45	  buc_bare "  BURN_HOST               = ${BURN_HOST}"
46	  buc_bare "  BURN_PLATFORM           = ${BURN_PLATFORM}"
47	  buc_bare "  BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER    = ${BURP_PRIVILEGED_USER}"
48	  buc_bare "  BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE= ${BURP_PRIVILEGED_KEY_FILE}"
49	  buc_bare "  BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE  = ${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}"
50	  buc_bare "  BURC_WORKLOAD_USER      = ${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}"
51	}
52	
53	# bujb_knock - probe workload reachability (workload SSH + remote no-op).
54	bujb_knock() {
55	  buc_doc_brief "Probe workload SSH reachability for an investiture"
56	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
57	
58	  test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}" || burp_die_no_folio
59	
60	  bujb_resolve_investiture
61	
62	  buc_step "Knocking ${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}@${BURN_HOST} (${BURP_VICEROYALTY})"
63	
64	  ssh -i "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}"     \
65	      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                       \
66	      -o BatchMode=yes                            \
67	      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new         \
68	      -o ConnectTimeout=10                        \
69	      "${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
70	      true                                        \
71	    || buc_die "Knock failed for ${BURP_VICEROYALTY}"
72	
73	  buc_step "Knock succeeded"
74	}
75	
76	# bujb_command_file - stream a local command file's contents to the workload
77	# remote shell. Captures stdout/stderr/exit to BURD_OUTPUT_DIR. Per spec:
78	# returns 0 when dispatch + capture complete (independent of remote exit);
79	# non-zero on SSH-level failure (exit 255).
80	bujb_command_file() {
81	  buc_doc_brief "Execute a local command file as workload; capture stdout/stderr/exit"
82	  buc_doc_param "command_file" "Local file streamed as the remote command body"
83	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
84	
85	  test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}" || burp_die_no_folio
86	
87	  local z_command_file="${1:-}"
88	  test -n "${z_command_file}"   || buc_usage_die
89	  test -f "${z_command_file}"   || buc_die "Command file not found: ${z_command_file}"
90	  test -r "${z_command_file}"   || buc_die "Command file not readable: ${z_command_file}"
91	
92	  bujb_resolve_investiture
93	
94	  buc_step "Streaming ${z_command_file} to ${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}@${BURN_HOST}"
95	  buc_step "Output dir: ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}"
96	
97	  local z_exit=0
98	  ssh -i "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}"     \
99	      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                       \
100	      -o BatchMode=yes                            \
101	      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new         \
102	      -o ConnectTimeout=10                        \
103	      "${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
104	      'bash -s'                                   \
105	      < "${z_command_file}"                       \
106	      > "${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/stdout.log"           \
107	      2> "${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/stderr.log"          \
108	    || z_exit=$?
109	
110	  echo "${z_exit}" > "${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/exitcode"
111	
112	  test "${z_exit}" -ne 255 \
113	    || buc_die "SSH connection or authentication failed (exit 255). See ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/stderr.log"
114	
115	  buc_step "Remote exit code: ${z_exit}"
116	  buc_step "Capture complete"
117	}
118	
119	# bujb_fenestrate - fenestrate ceremony (Windows OpenSSH only).
120	bujb_fenestrate_command() {
121	  buc_doc_brief "Fenestrate — admin SSH key trust + sshd_config harden (Windows)"
122	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
123	
124	  test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}" || burp_die_no_folio
125	  bujb_resolve_investiture
126	  bujb_fenestrate
127	}
128	
129	# bujb_garrison_bash - garrison ceremony, native bash workload shell (Linux/Mac).
130	bujb_garrison_bash() {
131	  buc_doc_brief "Garrison workload account on a bubep_linux/bubep_mac node (shell-letter b)"
132	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
133	
134	  test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}" || burp_die_no_folio
135	  bujb_resolve_investiture
136	  bujb_garrison b
137	}
138	
139	# bujb_garrison_cygwin - garrison ceremony, Cygwin bash workload shell (Windows).
140	bujb_garrison_cygwin() {
141	  buc_doc_brief "Garrison workload account on a bubep_windows node via Cygwin (shell-letter c)"
142	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
143	
144	  test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}" || burp_die_no_folio
145	  bujb_resolve_investiture
146	  bujb_garrison c
147	}
148	
149	# bujb_garrison_wsl - garrison ceremony, WSL bash workload shell (Windows).
150	bujb_garrison_wsl() {
151	  buc_doc_brief "Garrison workload account on a bubep_windows node via WSL (shell-letter w)"
152	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
153	
154	  test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}" || burp_die_no_folio
155	  bujb_resolve_investiture
156	  bujb_garrison w
157	}
158	
159	# bujb_interactive_session - hand control to ssh as workload.
160	bujb_interactive_session() {
161	  buc_doc_brief "Interactive SSH session as workload"
162	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
163	
164	  test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}" || burp_die_no_folio
165	
166	  bujb_resolve_investiture
167	
168	  buc_step "Opening interactive session: ${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}@${BURN_HOST} (${BURP_VICEROYALTY})"
169	
170	  exec ssh -t                                     \
171	      -i "${BURP_WORKLOAD_KEY_FILE}"     \
172	      -o IdentitiesOnly=yes                       \
173	      -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new         \
174	      "${BURC_WORKLOAD_USER}@${BURN_HOST}" \
175	      "bash -i"
176	}
177	
178	######################################################################
179	# Furnish and Main
180	
181	zbujb_furnish() {
182	  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
183	  buc_doc_env "BURD_CONFIG_DIR       " "BUK config directory (dispatch-provided)"
184	  buc_doc_env_done || return 0
185	
186	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buv_validation.sh"
187	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burd_regime.sh"
188	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burc_regime.sh"
189	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burs_regime.sh"
190	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buf_fact.sh"
191	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/bubc_constants.sh"
192	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burn_regime.sh"
193	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burp_regime.sh"
194	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/bupr_PresentationRegime.sh"
195	  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/bujb_jurisdiction.sh"
196	
197	  zbuv_kindle
198	  zburd_kindle
199	  zburd_enforce
200	
201	  source "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source BURC: ${BURD_REGIME_FILE}"
202	
203	  zburc_kindle
204	  zburc_enforce
205	
206	  source "${BURD_STATION_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source BURS: ${BURD_STATION_FILE}"
207	
208	  zburs_kindle
209	  zburs_enforce
210	
211	  zbupr_kindle
212	  zbujb_kindle
213	
214	  test -n "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}" || burp_die_no_folio
215	
216	  local -r z_burp_file="${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/${BUBC_rbmu_users_subdir}/${BURS_USER}/${BUZ_FOLIO}/burp.env"
217	  test -f "${z_burp_file}" || buc_die "BURP profile not found: ${z_burp_file}"
218	  source "${z_burp_file}"  || buc_die "Failed to source BURP: ${z_burp_file}"
219	  zburp_kindle
220	  zburp_enforce
221	
222	  # Cross-reference: BURP_VICEROYALTY must resolve to a registered BURN profile.
223	  local -r z_burn_file="${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/${BUBC_rbmn_nodes_subdir}/${BURP_VICEROYALTY}/burn.env"
224	  test -f "${z_burn_file}" || buc_die "BURN profile referenced by BURP_VICEROYALTY=${BURP_VICEROYALTY} not found: ${z_burn_file}"
225	  source "${z_burn_file}"  || buc_die "Failed to source BURN: ${z_burn_file}"
226	  zburn_kindle
227	  zburn_enforce
228	}
229	
230	buc_execute bujb_ "Bash Utility Jurisdiction" zbujb_furnish "$@"
231	
232	# eof
